channel.title: Blogs on In Jim's Personal Opinion
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on In Jim's Personal Opinion

item.title: Extended Error Use Case: errclass
item.description: Let’s build the errclass pacakge on top of the generic error wrapper created previously.

item.title: A Generic Go Custom Error Wrapper
item.description: Let’s build a custom error that uses generics to add type-safe sidecar data.

item.title: Typical First Post
item.description: Welcome to my blog. As is tradition, this first post talks about the intent of the blog as a whole.
